name: Hostinger VPS (OpenClaw Hosting)
focus: VPS-basiertes Hosting fuer OpenClaw mit voller Serverkontrolle.
best_for: Teams mit Linux-/DevOps-Erfahrung und Wunsch nach voller Kontrolle.
limitations: Setup, Updates und Security-Hardening liegen beim Nutzerteam.

name: Contabo (OpenClaw Hosting)
focus: OpenClaw deployment on Contabo VPS infrastructure.
price_model: VPS pricing tiers based on selected resources.
best_for: Teams that want predictable VPS costs with full control.
limitations: Infrastructure operations and hardening remain your responsibility.

name: IONOS (OpenClaw Hosting)
focus: OpenClaw hosting on IONOS server/VPS offerings.
best_for: Users looking for EU-focused hosting with self-managed deployment.
limitations: Setup and runtime operations are not fully managed.

name: Kilo AI (KiloClaw)
price_model: Plattformbasiertes Modell; Details je nach Angebot.
best_for: Teams, die schneller starten wollen und weniger Infrastruktur selbst betreiben.
limitations: Weniger Low-Level-Kontrolle als bei einem eigenen VPS.

name: STRATO (n8n Self-hosted)
focus: Self-hosted n8n setup on STRATO server products.
price_model: Server/VPS plans depending on instance size.
best_for: Teams that need n8n control with standard VPS workflows.
limitations: You handle installation, updates, and operational maintenance.

name: IONOS (n8n VPS Hosting)
focus: n8n hosting on IONOS VPS with self-managed deployment.
price_model: VPS plans by CPU, RAM, and storage profile.
best_for: n8n users who want flexibility and direct server access.
limitations: No fully managed n8n runtime included by default.

name: Contabo (n8n Hosting)
focus: n8n deployment on Contabo VPS infrastructure.
price_model: VPS tiers based on selected compute and storage.
best_for: Cost-conscious teams running n8n in self-hosted mode.
limitations: Operations, backups, and security remain self-managed.

name: Eigener VPS (Generic)
focus: OpenClaw auf eigenem VPS bei einem beliebigen IaaS/VPS-Provider betreiben.
price_model: Abhaengig vom gewaelten VPS-Provider und Ressourcenprofil.
best_for: Technische Teams mit klaren Anforderungen an Netzwerk, Security und Automatisierung.
limitations: Hoher Betriebsaufwand inkl. Monitoring, Backup und Patch-Management.
